mainEntity.name: How long does private limited company registration take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically 5-15 working days from submission of complete documents, depending on MCA processing times and ROC workload. We provide a clear timeline at the start of every engagement. Contact us at +91-99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What documents are needed for private limited company registration?

acceptedAnswer.text: Key documents include PAN card, Aadhaar, proof of registered office address, DSC of directors, and entity-specific documents (MOA/AOA/LLP Agreement). We provide a personalised checklist after the initial consultation.

mainEntity.name: Can Virtual Auditor handle this remotely?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. While we have physical offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai for in-person meetings, most company law filings are handled digitally through the MCA portal. Documents can be shared securely via email or our client portal.
